title: Local Business Website
body: **Every business (company, store, service provider, etc.), even if it doesn’t want to or can’t offer online services, needs to have an online presence.** We never know when we might need an auto repair shop, a law firm, a supermarket, or a hair salon. We can turn to the Yellow Pages, ask neighbors, or walk around the neighborhood looking for what we need, but with the internet, it’s much easier—we have services we can access from our computers, tablets, or smartphones. These days, if we aren’t on Google Maps, Foursquare, or Facebook, we don’t exist for many potential customers. That’s why, when developing a website of this type, it’s essential—in addition to creating an attractive and user-friendly site—to register the business on all these other geolocation services. The [etern centre wellness](http://eternwellness.com/ "visit the website") website is one of my latest projects. It’s built with WordPress, so it’s fully manageable by the client. In addition to the website itself, the project also includes integration with Facebook, Google Maps, and Foursquare, as well as a mailing service powered by MailChimp. For the design, to save on costs and time, I started with a theme from Elegant Themes, which I modified to adapt it to the client’s aesthetic and needs.
